'''Areta Bell''' was a [[Color/Legends|red]]-[[Hair/Legends|haired]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] native from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]], who served in both the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]] and the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] Areta Bell was the [[Navigator/Legends|navigator]] of the [[GR-75 medium transport/Legends|GR-75 medium transport]] [[Dutyfree/Legends|''Dutyfree'']], and participated in the evacuation of [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]]. Escorted by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]], Bell's transport ran the Imperial blockade and made it to the [[Haven (rendezvous point)|rendezvous point]].

Following the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], Areta Bell rose through the ranks of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and its successor, the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Under the new galactic government, Areta was promoted to the rank of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]], and commanded the [[Victory II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory II''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Swift Liberty]]''. She and her ship participated in the [[Hegemony theater|campaign]] against [[Prince-Admiral/Legends|Prince-Admiral]] [[Delak Krennel]], notably in the [[Battle of Liinade III]], where, under her command, the ''Swift Liberty'' helped the [[Moonshadow (Imperial II-class)|''Moonshadow'']] to disable the [[Ciutric Hegemony]]'s ''[[Direption]]''. During the battle, the ''Swift Liberty'' was the home to [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]].

By [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]], Areta Bell was assigned command of the [[Endurance-class fleet carrier|''Endurance''-class fleet carrier]] [[Endurance (Endurance-class)|''Endurance'']], assisting [[General/Legends|General]] Wedge Antilles in the [[Battle of Orinda]]. Despite Antilles' orders to launch her squadrons of [[E-7 E-wing multi-role starfighter|E-wing starfighters]] against the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] [[Reaper (Executor-class)|''Reaper'']], Bell hesitated, knowing that they were no match for the larger ship. Soon afterward, the [[Star Dreadnought/Legends|Star Dreadnought]] [[Dominion (Star Dreadnought)|''Dominion'']] arrived in system and joined in the attack on both ''Endurance'' and Antilles' command ship, ''[[Lusankya/Legends|Lusankya]]''. ''Lusankya'' was able to retreat, but ''Endurance'' was destroyed, killing all onboard, including Bell.
